action_id.description: Identifier of a saved local action to validate for remote execution (no process is started).

idempotency_key.description: Same idempotency key semantics as agent.action.run; used to detect would-replay without executing. RPC cache TTL uses AGENT_ACTION_RPC_IDEMPOTENCY_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS (see agent.action.run idempotency_key).

trace_id.description: Optional distributed trace id (same precedence as agent.action.run).

requested_by.description: Optional hub requester identity (same precedence as agent.action.run).

client_token.description: Opaque token or JWT for authorization when enableClientTokenAuthorization is active. Aliases: clientToken, auth
